title: Continuous Subarray Sum
hints: Consider prefix sums. If two prefixes have the same remainder when divided by k, the subarray between them sums to a multiple of k.
Use a hash map to store the first index where each remainder modulo k appears, enabling O(1) lookups for previous occurrences.
The map should store remainder-to-index mappings. Handle the edge case where a prefix sum itself is a multiple of k by initializing the map with remainder 0 at index -1.
